title: Setup Kubernetes infrastructure and databases (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Provision all required databases and infrastructure services including PostgreSQL, Redis/Valkey, Kafka, MongoDB, RabbitMQ, and SeaweedFS using CRDs
details: Deploy CloudNative-PG PostgreSQL cluster, Valkey Redis, Strimzi Kafka, Percona MongoDB, RabbitMQ cluster, and SeaweedFS for object storage. Configure namespaces, network policies, and resource quotas.
testStrategy: All CRDs deploy successfully, databases are reachable from test pods, health checks pass, persistent storage is provisioned

decisionPoints.description: Database sizing and resource allocation strategy

subtasks.title: Deploy database infrastructure (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis/Valkey)
subtasks.description: Deploy and configure CloudNative-PG PostgreSQL cluster, Percona MongoDB operator and cluster, and Valkey Redis instance with appropriate CRDs, storage configurations, and security settings
subtasks.details: Create namespace-specific deployments for PostgreSQL using CloudNative-PG operator, deploy Percona MongoDB operator and configure MongoDB cluster with replica sets, deploy Valkey Redis with persistence and clustering configuration. Configure persistent volumes, storage classes, and backup policies for each database system.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate database connectivity, persistence, and basic CRUD operations

subtasks.title: Deploy messaging and storage infrastructure (Kafka, RabbitMQ, SeaweedFS)
subtasks.description: Deploy and configure Strimzi Kafka cluster, RabbitMQ cluster operator, and SeaweedFS distributed object storage system with appropriate CRDs and network configurations
subtasks.details: Install Strimzi Kafka operator and create Kafka cluster with multiple brokers, deploy RabbitMQ cluster operator and configure high-availability RabbitMQ cluster, deploy SeaweedFS master, volume, and filer services for distributed object storage. Configure inter-service networking, security policies, and resource allocations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test message publishing/consuming, object storage operations, and service discovery

subtasks.title: Configure Kubernetes infrastructure (namespaces, policies, quotas)
subtasks.description: Set up Kubernetes namespaces, network policies, RBAC configurations, resource quotas, and security contexts for all deployed infrastructure services
subtasks.details: Create dedicated namespaces for each service group, implement network policies for service isolation and communication rules, configure RBAC for service accounts and operators, set resource quotas and limits for CPU/memory/storage, implement pod security policies and security contexts. Configure ingress rules and service mesh integration if required.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify namespace isolation, policy enforcement, and resource limit compliance

subtasks.title: Review and validate infrastructure deployment
subtasks.description: Comprehensive review of all deployed infrastructure components, security configurations, and operational readiness including performance validation and disaster recovery testing
subtasks.details: Review CRD configurations and operator deployments for best practices compliance, validate security policies and RBAC configurations, test backup and recovery procedures for all databases, verify monitoring and alerting setup, conduct load testing on messaging systems, validate object storage performance and replication. Create operational runbooks and troubleshooting guides.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end integration testing, disaster recovery simulation, and performance benchmarking

title: Configure Kubernetes networking and ingress (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Setup ingress controllers, load balancers, and service mesh for inter-service communication
details: Deploy NGINX ingress controller, configure TLS termination, setup service mesh for secure service-to-service communication, and configure external LoadBalancer services.
testStrategy: External traffic reaches services through ingress, TLS certificates are valid, service mesh connectivity verified between namespaces

subtasks.title: Deploy and configure NGINX ingress controller
subtasks.description: Install NGINX ingress controller in the Kubernetes cluster and configure basic routing capabilities

subtasks.testStrategy: Verify controller pods are running and ingress class is available

subtasks.title: Setup TLS termination and certificate management

subtasks.details: Install and configure cert-manager for automatic certificate provisioning. Create ClusterIssuer resources for Let's Encrypt or internal CA. Configure ingress resources with TLS blocks and certificate annotations. Setup automatic certificate renewal and validation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test HTTPS endpoints and verify certificate validity

subtasks.title: Deploy service mesh and configure service-to-service communication
subtasks.description: Install and configure service mesh (Istio/Linkerd) for secure inter-service communication with mTLS
subtasks.details: Deploy service mesh control plane and data plane components. Configure automatic sidecar injection for application namespaces. Setup mTLS policies for service-to-service encryption. Configure traffic policies, load balancing, and service discovery within the mesh.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify mTLS is working between services and traffic policies are applied

subtasks.title: Review networking configuration and validate security policies
subtasks.description: Comprehensive review of all networking components, security policies, and integration testing
subtasks.details: Review ingress controller configuration, TLS setup, and service mesh policies for security best practices. Validate that traffic flows correctly through the ingress to backend services via the service mesh. Test LoadBalancer services external connectivity. Ensure network policies align with security requirements and troubleshoot any connectivity issues.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end traffic testing, security policy validation, and load balancer connectivity tests

title: Setup observability stack (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Deploy Prometheus, Grafana, and logging infrastructure for monitoring and observability

subtasks.testStrategy: Verify Prometheus targets are being scraped, test alerting rules trigger correctly, validate metrics retention

subtasks.title: Deploy Grafana with AlertHub Integration

subtasks.details: Deploy Grafana using Helm chart or manifests, configure Prometheus as primary data source, import AlertHub-specific dashboards for application metrics, set up user authentication and RBAC, configure notification channels for alerts, create custom dashboards for infrastructure and application monitoring with appropriate panels and queries.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate dashboard functionality, test data source connectivity, verify alert notifications work correctly

subtasks.testStrategy: Test log ingestion from multiple sources, verify trace collection and visualization, validate log search and filtering capabilities

subtasks.title: Review and Validate Observability Stack Integration

subtasks.details: Review all deployed components for security best practices, validate cross-component integration (Prometheus scraping metrics, Grafana displaying data, logs flowing to central store), verify resource limits and requests are appropriate, check backup and disaster recovery procedures, validate alerting workflows end-to-end, ensure monitoring covers all critical infrastructure and application components, review documentation and runbooks.

title: Implement native desktop notifications (Spark - Electron)

subtasks.title: Implement core native notification API integration

subtasks.details: Create a NotificationService class that wraps Electron's Notification API. Implement methods for creating and displaying basic notifications with title, body, and icon. Set up the core notification manager that interfaces with the operating system's notification center. Handle platform-specific notification behaviors for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Establish the base architecture for notification management including event emitters and state tracking.

Add support for notification reply functionality where supported by the platform. Create a routing system to handle deep linking when notifications are clicked, allowing users to navigate directly to relevant app sections. Implement notification dismissal tracking and cleanup.

subtasks.details: Implement notification permission request flow using Electron's permission APIs. Create a settings interface for users to control notification preferences including enable/disable toggles, sound settings, and notification priority levels. Add permission status checking and graceful degradation when permissions are denied. Implement notification queue management for when permissions change. Create user-friendly permission request dialogs and handle edge cases like permission revocation.
